pre_check_flags.detail: Diff size looks larger than expected: changed_lines=15259, expected≈10, ratio=1525.90, files=42, hunks=94.

criteria.name: The Phase-1 schema migration creates required topic-editor tables with uniqueness and indexes
criteria.evidence: The migration creates the seven requested tables and many indexes, including `topic_editor_runs_active_lease_idx`, but it omits the required lease expiry column/mechanism from the settled active-only-lease decision. There is no `lease_expires_at` in `.migrations_staging/20260513230500_live_update_topic_editor_phase1.sql`.

criteria.name: Transition action vocabulary excludes unapproved rejected update/discard actions
criteria.evidence: `.migrations_staging/20260513230500_live_update_topic_editor_phase1.sql` constrains actions to base actions plus `rejected_post_simple`, `rejected_post_sectioned`, and `rejected_watch`; `rg` found no production `rejected_update_sources` or `rejected_discard` use.

criteria.name: `topic_editor_runs` is the single new-editor run lifecycle table
criteria.evidence: The new migration, storage wrappers, `TopicEditor`, admin status, and runbook all use `topic_editor_runs`; legacy `live_update_editor_runs` references remain in legacy/debug paths only.

criteria.name: Concurrent-run protection is scoped to active/running leases only
criteria.evidence: The partial unique index is scoped to `status = 'running'`, so completed/failed rows do not block later runs. However the settled decision also required stale running rows to expire before acquisition; the schema has no `lease_expires_at`, and `StorageHandler.acquire_topic_editor_run` only inserts a row without expiring stale running leases.

criteria.name: Backfill is idempotent and produces posted/watching parity counts against legacy tables
criteria.evidence: `scripts/backfill_live_update_topics.py` is implemented and tested for idempotent upserts and parity output, but execution evidence never runs the real backfill command against prod/dev. Commands only py-compile and pytest the script; there are no actual posted/watching parity counts proving topic counts are at least legacy counts.

criteria.name: Every `TopicEditor` storage operation has async storage helper and db_handler wrapper
criteria.evidence: `src/common/storage_handler.py` and `src/common/db_handler.py` both contain wrappers for topic runs, topics, sources, aliases, transitions, observations, checkpoints, and checkpoint mirrors; `tests/test_live_storage_wrappers.py` covers reachability.

criteria.name: `TopicEditor.run_once()` can execute with publishing disabled and avoid Discord publishing calls
criteria.evidence: `TopicEditor.run_once()` reads `topic_editor_checkpoints`, writes topic state through `db_handler`, and `_publish_topic` suppresses sends unless `TOPIC_EDITOR_PUBLISHING_ENABLED=true`; executor evidence includes a publishing-off replay with `published=0` and `failed_publish=0`.

criteria.name: Dispatcher failure audit mapping uses locked rejected/base action semantics
criteria.evidence: `_reject_create_tool` logs only locked `rejected_*` create/watch actions, while `_dispatch_update_sources` and `_dispatch_discard` log `update_sources`/`discard` with `payload.outcome='tool_error'`.

criteria.name: Idempotent replay of the same `(run_id, tool_call_id)` returns the prior result without duplicate transitions
criteria.evidence: `_is_idempotent_replay` only tracks tool call IDs in an in-memory set and returns a generic `idempotent_replay` outcome. It does not look up or return the prior stored tool result for `(run_id, tool_call_id)`, and cannot handle replays across a process/retry boundary.

criteria.name: All four dispatcher invariants are covered by tests
criteria.evidence: Tests cover structural rejection, collision rejection/override, same-response idempotency, and duplicate source dedupe. But the override logging path conflicts with the DB unique index on `(run_id, tool_call_id)`: accepted transition and override transition use the same `tool_call_id`, so real Supabase can reject the override row. The tests use fakes and do not catch the production unique-index conflict.

criteria.name: `render_topic()` is pure and tested for simple, sectioned, story-update, and partial publish failure/update behavior
criteria.evidence: `render_topic(topic)` is a top-level pure formatter in `topic_editor.py`; tests cover simple, sectioned, parent update rendering, suppressed publishing, sent publishing, failed publishing, and partial publish failure.

criteria.name: Scheduled/startup/manual runtime routes to topic editor by default with injection seam and rollback selector
criteria.evidence: `src/features/summarising/summariser_cog.py` imports `TopicEditor`, defaults to it when backend is unset or topic-oriented, preserves injected `live_update_editor`, and supports `LIVE_UPDATE_EDITOR_BACKEND=legacy`; `tests/test_live_runtime_wiring.py` covers this.

criteria.name: Legacy `live_update_editor.py` and `live_update_prompts.py` are not materially modified except allowed legacy compatibility changes
criteria.evidence: The implementation adds `topic_editor.py` and wiring. Existing legacy modules appear as untracked in this workspace, but executor notes and grep evidence show the new logic was not placed in legacy editor/prompts; test changes preserve legacy compatibility.

criteria.name: Admin chat and health checks report topic-editor primary state with legacy rollback labels
criteria.evidence: `src/features/admin_chat/tools.py`, `src/features/admin_chat/agent.py`, and `src/features/health/health_check_cog.py` reference `topic_editor_runs`, `topics`, and `topic_transitions` as primary; legacy tables are labeled rollback state. `tests/test_live_admin_health.py` covers the behavior.

criteria.name: Runbook no longer requires stale Phase-1 soak/gate or 20-window replay and uses `topic_editor_runs`
criteria.evidence: `docs/live-update-editor-phase-2-runbook.md` uses `topic_editor_runs` for new-editor verification and includes stale soak/gate/20-window items only in a `What Not To Use` style section, not as active procedure.

criteria.name: Existing legacy live-update tests pass or remain marked/updated as legacy compatibility without deleting rollback coverage
criteria.evidence: Executor evidence reports targeted legacy compatibility tests passed and final full suite passed with `341 passed, 19 skipped`; legacy test files remain present.

criteria.name: Publishing-off sanity replay over latest prod source-message window completes with trace
criteria.evidence: Executor evidence reports `TOPIC_EDITOR_PUBLISHING_ENABLED=false python scripts/run_live_update_dev.py --topic-editor-replay-prod --source-limit 20` completed run `13ba6483-a33a-4476-bca6-6d50799f5cfa` with 20 sources, 4 read tool calls, publishing OFF, and no published messages.

criteria.name: Publishing flip rollback mirrors topic checkpoint back to legacy checkpoint before legacy invocation
criteria.evidence: `docs/live-update-editor-phase-2-runbook.md` documents mirroring `topic_editor_checkpoints` into `live_update_checkpoints`; `src/common/storage_handler.py` and `src/common/db_handler.py` implement `mirror_topic_editor_checkpoint_to_live`.

criteria.name: New editor code is organized around deterministic helpers rather than burying behavior in prompt
criteria.evidence: Canonicalization, alias resolution, collision detection, transition payload shaping, dispatch, and rendering are deterministic functions/methods in `topic_editor.py`; the prompt remains short and structural.

criteria.name: Cost/latency metadata is recorded per topic-editor run
criteria.evidence: `TopicEditor._run_updates` stores token usage, optional cost estimate, model, latency, tool counts, and publish metadata into `topic_editor_runs` updates and trace output.

criteria.name: Operator-only runbook values are filled before prod cutover
criteria.evidence: This is an operator-owned cutover item. The implementation documents the variables and current safe defaults; production trace-channel swap and publishing flip remain after_execute/user actions.

issues: T3/T6: Topic-editor run leases do not implement stale expiry; `lease_expires_at` is missing and acquire only inserts a running row.
T4/T15: The real legacy-to-topic backfill was not executed, so required posted/watching parity counts against legacy tables were never produced.
T8/T14: Idempotent replay only uses an in-memory seen set and returns a generic replay marker, not the prior result for `(run_id, tool_call_id)`.
T8: Override transition logging uses the same `tool_call_id` as the accepted transition while the DB has a unique `(run_id, tool_call_id)` index, so real override audit rows can be rejected.

rework_items.issue: The topic-editor lease schema omits stale lease expiry support.
rework_items.expected: `topic_editor_runs` includes a `lease_expires_at` column or equivalent lease expiry mechanism, and active leases can be considered stale based on that timestamp.
rework_items.actual: `.migrations_staging/20260513230500_live_update_topic_editor_phase1.sql` has no `lease_expires_at` column; only a partial unique index on rows where `status = 'running'`.

rework_items.issue: Lease acquisition does not expire stale running rows before creating a new run.
rework_items.expected: Before inserting a new running lease, storage/db code marks stale running rows failed/skipped when `lease_expires_at < now()` so a crashed run cannot permanently block the tuple.
rework_items.actual: `StorageHandler.acquire_topic_editor_run` only inserts into `topic_editor_runs`; no query updates stale running rows, and `rg lease_expires|stale` finds no topic-editor lease expiry implementation.

rework_items.issue: The required production/dev backfill parity was not actually run.
rework_items.expected: Run `scripts/backfill_live_update_topics.py` against the target environment and record posted/watching legacy counts versus topic rows, with deltas explained.
rework_items.actual: Execution only compiled and unit-tested `scripts/backfill_live_update_topics.py`; command evidence contains no real backfill invocation or parity output against Supabase data.

rework_items.issue: Idempotent replay does not return the prior result for a `(run_id, tool_call_id)`.
rework_items.expected: Repeated tool calls for the same `(run_id, tool_call_id)` return the originally recorded tool result and create no duplicate side effects, including across retried execution where prior transitions already exist.
rework_items.actual: `_is_idempotent_replay` only checks an in-memory `seen_tool_call_ids` set and `_dispatch_tool_call` returns `{'outcome': 'idempotent_replay'}` instead of the prior result; no prior transition lookup exists.

rework_items.issue: Collision override audit rows can violate the DB idempotency unique index.
rework_items.expected: Accepted create/watch transition and any `override` audit rows must all be persistable while preserving idempotency, e.g. by using distinct audit identifiers or a uniqueness model that allows multiple rows for one tool call when one is an override audit.
rework_items.actual: The migration creates `topic_transitions_tool_call_idx` unique on `(run_id, tool_call_id)`, while `_dispatch_create_topic_tool` stores the accepted transition and then `build_override_transitions(..., tool_call_id=call['id'])`; the override row has the same `run_id`/`tool_call_id` and can be rejected by Supabase.

summary: Needs rework. Most of the topic-editor implementation is present and the major critique flags were addressed, but several hard gates remain incomplete: stale lease expiry is missing, real backfill parity was not run, idempotent replay is only in-memory and does not return the prior result, and override audit rows conflict with the transition idempotency unique index.

Needs rework. Backfill script exists and is unit tested, but the actual backfill/parity check was not executed.
Pass. Deterministic canonicalization, alias, collision, and transition helpers are present and tested.
Needs rework. Storage/db wrappers exist, but lease acquisition does not expire stale running rows.
Pass. `TopicEditor.run_once` uses injected db handler, tool-use surface, checkpoints, runs, and metadata.
Needs rework. Base/rejected action mapping is correct, but idempotency and override audit persistence have production gaps.
Pass. Pure renderer and gated publishing behavior are implemented and tested.
Pass. Trace output and one-shot replay entrypoint are implemented; replay evidence exists in T15.
Pass. Runtime selector defaults to topic editor in code and preserves injection/legacy rollback selector.
Pass. Admin/health surfaces now center topic-editor state and label legacy rollback state.
Pass. Runbook is reconciled to sprint gates and documents rollback checkpoint mirroring.
Needs rework. Added useful tests, but tests miss the real DB override unique-index conflict and do not validate prior-result replay semantics.
Needs rework. Validation is broad and the final suite reportedly passes, but it did not include real backfill parity and did not catch the lease/idempotency/override persistence gaps.
